description: Represents a pattern compliance violation (src/shared/models/pattern_graph.py). PatternViolation is the output of the pattern checker. PatternValidationResult (sibling in the same file: pattern_id, passed, violations, total_components, compliant) aggregates these. VOCABULARY DRIFT: severity uses values {error, warning, info} (lowercase, comment-documented); AuditFinding.severity uses AuditSeverity enum (INFO/WARNING/ERROR — capitalized); ViolationReport.severity uses {error, warning}. Three overlapping severity surfaces — reconciliation against the audit_severity enum in .intent/META/enums.json is a governor decision. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 2 Session 2.

pattern_id.description: Identifier of the pattern whose compliance was violated (str | None). Default None.

message.description: Human-readable violation description. Default empty string.

severity.description: Violation severity. Values: error, warning, info (lowercase, comment-documented — not enum). DISCREPANCY with AuditFinding.severity (AuditSeverity enum) and ViolationReport.severity ({error, warning}). Reconciliation pending.

file_path.description: File path where the violation was detected (str | None). Default None.

component_name.description: Name of the component involved in the violation (str | None). Default None.

line_number.description: Line number within file_path (int | None). Default None.
